requirement_topic.en: China GB / NB Baseline Versus Uzbekistan Evidence
requirement_topic.zh: 中国GB / NB基线与乌兹别克斯坦证据
requirement_topic.zht: 中國GB / NB基線與烏茲別克斯坦證據

summary.en: Uzbekistan stakeholders may accept Chinese GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, GB/T 34120-2023, GB/T 36558-2023, and NB/T 42090-2016 reports as useful background evidence for BESS cells, PCS, and systems, but they generally need to be mapped to the Uzbekistan package: O'zstandart conformity certification, O'z DSt / GOST / IEC standards specified in the contract, grid-connection requirements, fire-safety review, transport evidence, and Uzbek or Russian technical documentation.
summary.zh: 乌兹别克斯坦相关方可能将中国GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 34120-2023、GB/T 36558-2023和NB/T 42090-2016报告作为BESS电芯、PCS和系统的有用背景证据，但通常需要映射至乌兹别克斯坦资料包：O'zstandart符合性认证、合同指定的O'z DSt/GOST/IEC标准、并网要求、消防安全审查、运输证据和乌兹别克语或俄语技术文件。
summary.zht: 烏茲別克斯坦相關方可能將中國GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 34120-2023、GB/T 36558-2023和NB/T 42090-2016報告作為BESS電芯、PCS和系統的有用背景證據，但通常需要映射至烏茲別克斯坦資料包：O'zstandart符合性認證、合同指定的O'z DSt/GOST/IEC標準、併網要求、消防安全審查、運輸證據和烏茲別克語或俄語技術文件。

standards_or_laws: O'zstandart mandatory conformity certification for regulated electrical products
IEC 62619 / IEC 62133 / IEC 62933 or applicable O'z DSt / GOST adoption
Uzbekistan grid, fire, transport, customs, and project requirements

summary.en: GB 44240-2024 is China's compulsory safety standard for lithium-ion cells and batteries for electric energy storage, while GB/T 36276-2023 is commonly used for lithium-ion batteries for electric energy storage. GB/T 34120-2023, GB/T 36558-2023, and NB/T 42090-2016 are common China-side PCS and grid-connected ESS references. Together they form the typical China-side technical baseline for a BESS export package.
summary.zh: GB 44240-2024是中国电力储能用锂离子电芯和电池强制性安全标准，GB/T 36276-2023通常用于电力储能用锂离子电池。GB/T 34120-2023、GB/T 36558-2023和NB/T 42090-2016是中国侧常见PCS和并网储能系统参考标准。连同PCS和系统报告，这些文件构成BESS出口资料包中常见的中国侧技术基线。
summary.zht: GB 44240-2024是中國電力儲能用鋰離子電芯和電池強制性安全標準，GB/T 36276-2023通常用於電力儲能用鋰離子電池。GB/T 34120-2023、GB/T 36558-2023和NB/T 42090-2016是中國側常見PCS和併網儲能系統參考標準。連同PCS和系統報告，這些文件構成BESS出口資料包中常見的中國側技術基線。

gap.en: The practical gap is recognition and traceability. Exporters should prepare a document matrix showing which Chinese test report, drawing, BMS function, PCS setting, safety analysis, factory certificate, and commissioning record satisfies each Uzbekistan O'zstandart, O'z DSt/GOST/IEC, grid, fire, lender, and transport item, then identify missing retests, translations, local applicant documents, markings, and site records.
gap.zh: 实际差距在认可和可追溯性。出口商应准备文件矩阵，说明每份中国测试报告、图纸、BMS功能、PCS参数、安全分析、工厂证书和调试记录分别满足乌兹别克斯坦O'zstandart、O'z DSt/GOST/IEC、并网、消防、出借方和运输的哪些项目，并识别缺失的补测、翻译、当地申请人文件、标识和现场记录。
gap.zht: 實際差距在認可和可追溯性。出口商應準備文件矩陣，說明每份中國測試報告、圖紙、BMS功能、PCS參數、安全分析、工廠證書和調試記錄分別滿足烏茲別克斯坦O'zstandart、O'z DSt/GOST/IEC、併網、消防、出借方和運輸的哪些項目，並識別缺失的補測、翻譯、當地申請人文件、標識和現場記錄。

mandatory_status.target: Informational mapping requirement; underlying O'zstandart, grid, fire, transport, lender, and project requirements may be mandatory depending on scope
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic CN market under GB 44240-2024 where in scope; other GB/T and NB/T documents are recommended, project-specific, or commonly referenced

source.publisher: State Administration for Market Regulation Standard Information Public Service Platform

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] China GB/T and NB/T BESS evidence is a technical baseline, not an Uzbekistan clearance package. It should be mapped to O'zstandart certification, O'z DSt / GOST / IEC evidence, grid, fire, lender, and UN 38.3 deliverables.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T和NB/T储能证据是技术基线，不是乌兹别克斯坦通关或准入资料包。应将其映射至O'zstandart认证、O'z DSt/GOST/IEC证据、并网、消防、出借方和UN 38.3交付项。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T和NB/T儲能證據是技術基線，不是烏茲別克斯坦通關或准入資料包。應將其映射至O'zstandart認證、O'z DSt/GOST/IEC證據、併網、消防、出借方和UN 38.3交付項。
